what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates the attachment id att-3379b766 with a board item target in the dragnet-development channel, recording the attachment type and creation timestamp.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter with no additional body content.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added.
The target is a board:// URI referencing item-37910df7.
standouts: It is a pure metadata/reference file with no explanatory text.
The target uses a board:// URI scheme to identify a board item.
It functions as a dated ledger entry linking an attachment to a channel.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit UTC offset.
Uses a URI-style identifier (board://item-37910df7) for the target.
Stored as a markdown file in a channel_attachments directory.
concerns: The attachment carries no title, summary, or reason, so its meaning depends entirely on external board item content.
The target board item is opaque from this file alone.
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points from the dragnet-development channel to board item item-37910df7, created on 2026-06-24.
questions: What content or topic does board item item-37910df7 represent?
What does the board_items attachment type signify about the relationship?
Why was this attachment added to the dragnet-development channel at this time?
apparent_themes: Cross-reference between channels and board items
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a persistent, timestamped association between a channel attachment identifier and a specific board item in a development channel.
novelty: It uses a board:// URI scheme to identify the target item rather than a file path or conventional URL.
contribution: It provides a unique attachment identifier and a dated association between the dragnet-development channel and board item item-37910df7, which a fused system could use as a linkage node.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-3379b766 in the dragnet-development channel of type board_items pointing to board://item-37910df7, created at 2026-06-24T05:12:09Z.
intention_for_embedding: To log a channel attachment that links board item item-37910df7 to the dragnet-development channel at a specific time.
